sections.biography-source-undefined:
Han Guan was styled Manyou.

He had discernment, insight, talent, and capability. He served as Inspector of Yu Province and gained great governance achievements. He died in office.

full_text:
Han Guan (Manyou) 韓觀 (曼遊)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Guan (韓觀), styledManyou (曼遊), was born in Yan commandery. Of great ability and penetrating intelligence, held in great esteem. Han Guan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
